title: Paid Media Cost Per Acquisition and Quality Score
industry: SaaS, E-Commerce, Direct-to-Consumer, Financial Services, Insurance — sectors where auction-priced placements consume measurable budget lines and CFO scrutiny on acquisition economics is routine.
dataSources:
Unified envelope `index=business` with normalized sourcetypes after Heavy Forwarder JSON parsing plus CRM joins:
• Google Ads API v17 — GAQL polling (`google.ads.service.GoogleAdsService/Search`) returning REST-shaped rows mapped to `sourcetype="paid_media:google_ads_gaql"` with fields aligned to GAQL aliases (`campaign.id`, `campaign.name`, `metrics.cost_micros`, `metrics.impressions`, `metrics.clicks`, `metrics.conversions`, `metrics.search_impression_share`, `metrics.search_rank_lost_impression_share`, `metrics.search_budget_lost_impression_share`, `metrics.quality_score`, `metrics.average_cpc`, bidding enums such as `MAXIMIZE_CONVERSIONS`, `TARGET_CPA`, `TARGET_ROAS`). OAuth 2.0 refresh tokens plus developer token stored in Splunk credential locker; modular input cadence example every four hours.
• Microsoft Advertising API v13 Reporting/Bulk aggregates landing as `paid_media:microsoft_reporting` including Quality Impact (−2..0), Auction Insights extracts (`microsoft.ads.reporting.v13`), UET-assisted conversion totals.
• Meta Marketing API v20.0 Graph `/act_{ad_account_id}/insights` JSON (`campaign_name`, `spend`, `impressions`, `actions`, `cost_per_action_type`, `conversion_values`) ingested via Splunk HTTP Event Collector from a hardened poll worker or aggregator export → `paid_media:meta_insights`; companion Conversions API server payloads optionally land `paid_media:meta_capi` with `event_id` dedupe keys.
• LinkedIn Marketing API (`/rest/adAnalytics`) JSON with `costInLocalCurrency`, `impressions`, `clicks`, `oneClickLeads`, `leadGenerationMailContactInfoShares` → `paid_media:linkedin_analytics` (OAuth 2.0, UTC-aligned `_time`).
• TikTok Marketing API v1.3 `/report/integrated/get/` rows → `paid_media:tiktok_reports`; Reddit Ads API, Pinterest API v5, Snap Ads API, X Ads API v12 poll derivatives captured similarly under `paid_media:social_bulk` when consolidated.
• Programmatic extracts from warehouse connectors (The Trade Desk, DV360, Amazon DSP, StackAdapt, Criteo Marketing Solutions, AdRoll) landed nightly via Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686) `dbx:dsp_spend`.
• Aggregator parity feeds — Supermetrics, Funnel.io, Improvado, Adverity, Fivetran marketing connectors, Triple Whale dashboards staged before JDBC replay — acceptable upstream when normalized prior to ingest.
• Mobile attribution bridges AppsFlyer, Adjust, Branch.io deferred-deep-link receipts, Singular cross-channel cohort files → `paid_mobile:post_install`.
• CRM proof — Splunk Add-on for Salesforce (Splunkbase 4146) opportunity snapshots (`salesforce:opportunity`) or JDBC replicas (`dbx:crm_opportunities`) plus Splunk DB Connect pulls for closed-won joins on campaign keys.
• First-party web tagging — Google Tag Manager container diagnostics forwarded through HEC (`gtm:ss_listener`) preserving `utm_source`, `utm_medium`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_content`, `utm_term` alongside hashed Enhanced Conversion payloads.
Example vendor payloads referenced inline inside props/transform notes below.
app: Custom modular inputs / Splunk Add-on Builder REST workers for Google Ads API v17 + Meta Marketing API + LinkedIn Ads + TikTok OAuth polls landing on Heavy Forwarders; Splunk HTTP Event Collector for webhook-capable feeds; Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) for warehouse parity and Salesforce Opportunity replicas; Splunk Add-on for Salesforce ([Splunkbase 4146](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4146)) where packaged REST inputs emit Opportunity rows through TA-managed OAuth.
spl:
index=business (sourcetype="paid_media:google_ads_gaql" OR sourcetype="paid_media:microsoft_reporting" OR sourcetype="paid_media:meta_insights" OR sourcetype="paid_media:linkedin_analytics" OR sourcetype="paid_media:tiktok_reports" OR sourcetype="paid_media:social_bulk" OR sourcetype="paid_media:dsp_spend") earliest=-30d@d latest=now
| eval report_date=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d")
| eval platform_raw=lower(trim(coalesce(platform,vendor,ad_network,data_source,"")))
| eval platform=case(match(platform_raw,"google|ads_search|dsa"),"google_ads", match(platform_raw,"bing|microsoft|msn"),"microsoft_ads", match(platform_raw,"meta|facebook|instagram"),"meta", match(platform_raw,"linkedin"),"linkedin", match(platform_raw,"tiktok"),"tiktok", match(platform_raw,"reddit"),"reddit", match(platform_raw,"pinterest"),"pinterest", match(platform_raw,"snap"),"snapchat", match(platform_raw,"twitter|\\bx\\b"),"twitter_ads", match(platform_raw,"ttd|dv360|stackadapt|criteo|dsp|amazon\\sdsp"),"dsp", 1=1,"other")
| eval account_id=coalesce(customer_id,account_id,ad_account_id)
| eval campaign_id=coalesce('campaign.id',campaign_id,campaignId)
| eval campaign_name=coalesce('campaign.name',campaign_name,campaign_name_std,campaign_name_alt)
| eval campaign_slug=lower(trim(coalesce(campaign_slug,utm_campaign,campaign_external_key,"")))
| eval adset_id=coalesce(ad_group_id,adset_id,ad_group.id)
| eval ad_id=coalesce(ad_id,ad.id,creative_id,creative.id)
| eval currency_code=upper(trim(coalesce(account_currency,currency,currency_code,"USD")))
| eval spend_micros=tonumber(coalesce(cost_micros,costMicros,metrics.cost_micros,"0"))
| eval spend_native=case(platform IN ("google_ads","microsoft_ads") AND spend_micros>0, spend_micros/1000000.0, platform="meta", tonumber(coalesce(spend,spend_usd,"0")), platform="linkedin", tonumber(coalesce(costInLocalCurrency,spend,"0")), 1=1, tonumber(coalesce(spend,spend_usd,amount_local,"0")))
| lookup fx_rates_daily date AS report_date currency_code OUTPUT rate_to_usd AS fx_rate
| eval spend_usd=if(isnotnull(fx_rate), round(spend_native*fx_rate,4), spend_native)
| eval impressions=tonumber(coalesce(impressions,metrics.impressions,"0"))
| eval clicks=tonumber(coalesce(clicks,metrics.clicks,"0"))
| eval reported_conversions=tonumber(coalesce(metrics.conversions,conversions,purchase_actions,"0"))
| eval reported_revenue_usd=tonumber(coalesce(conversion_values,revenue_usd,purchase_value,"0"))
| eval quality_score_or_relevance=tonumber(coalesce(metrics.quality_score,quality_score,qualityImpact,""))
| eval qs_numeric=if(isnum(quality_score_or_relevance),quality_score_or_relevance,null())
| eval average_cpc_micros=tonumber(coalesce(metrics.average_cpc,average_cpc_micros,"0"))
| eval average_cpc_usd=case(platform IN ("google_ads","microsoft_ads") AND average_cpc_micros>1000, average_cpc_micros/1000000.0, average_cpc_micros>0 AND average_cpc_micros<500, average_cpc_micros, 1=1, tonumber(average_cpc_micros))
| eval bid_strategy=upper(trim(coalesce(bidding_strategy,bidding_strategy_type,bidding_strategy_enum,"UNKNOWN")))
| eval bid_strategy_bucket=case(bid_strategy="MANUAL_CPC","manual", bid_strategy IN ("MAXIMIZE_CONVERSIONS","TARGET_CPA","TARGET_ROAS","MAXIMIZE_CONVERSION_VALUE"),"smart_bidding", match(bid_strategy,"MAXIMIZE"),"smart_bidding", 1=1,"other")
| eval creative_format=coalesce(creative_format,ad_format,placement,"unknown")
| eval rank_lost_share=tonumber(coalesce(metrics.search_rank_lost_impression_share,search_rank_lost_impression_share,"0"))
| eval budget_lost_share=tonumber(coalesce(metrics.search_budget_lost_impression_share,search_budget_lost_impression_share,"0"))
| eval eligibility_lost_share=tonumber(coalesce(metrics.search_exact_match_impression_share_lost_eligibility,exact_match_eligibility_lost,"0"))
| eval quality_score_band=case(qs_numeric>=8,"Above-Avg", qs_numeric IN (5,6,7),"Average", isnotnull(qs_numeric),"Below-Avg", 1=1,"unknown")
| eval tz_anchor=coalesce(account_timezone,"America/New_York")
| eval reporting_stamp=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eventstats avg(average_cpc_usd) AS qc_avg_cpc_band by quality_score_band platform
| stats sum(spend_usd) AS spend_usd sum(impressions) AS impressions sum(clicks) AS clicks sum(reported_conversions) AS reported_conversions sum(reported_revenue_usd) AS reported_revenue_usd avg(qs_numeric) AS avg_quality_score avg(average_cpc_usd) AS qc_avg_cpc avg(rank_lost_share) AS avg_rank_lost avg(budget_lost_share) AS avg_budget_lost avg(eligibility_lost_share) AS avg_eligibility_lost dc(ad_id) AS creative_variants values(bid_strategy_bucket) AS bid_buckets max(qc_avg_cpc_band) AS qc_band_peer_avg first(campaign_slug) AS campaign_slug latest(reporting_stamp) AS last_reporting_anchor by platform account_id campaign_id campaign_name quality_score_band
| eval channel_cpa_blended=if(reported_conversions>0, round(spend_usd/reported_conversions,2), null())
| lookup utm_campaign_taxonomy.csv campaign_slug OUTPUT qualified_lead_definition cadence_notes
| join type=left campaign_id max=50000 [
    search index=business (sourcetype="marketo:activities" OR sourcetype="hubspot:lead_touch" OR sourcetype="crm:mql_bridge") earliest=-30d@d latest=now
    | eval campaign_key=lower(trim(coalesce(utm_campaign,campaign_external_id,"")))
    | stats dc(lead_hash) AS qualified_leads sum(eval(if(match(lower(status_bucket),"qualified|accepted"),1,0))) AS gov_touch_volume by campaign_key
    | rename campaign_key AS campaign_id
]
| fillnull value=0 qualified_leads
| eval channel_cpa_qualified=if(qualified_leads>0, round(spend_usd/qualified_leads,2), null())
| join type=left campaign_id max=50000 [
    search index=business (sourcetype="salesforce:opportunity" OR sourcetype="dbx:crm_opportunities") earliest=-365d@d latest=now
    | eval bridge_key=lower(trim(coalesce(CampaignId,Campaign_Key,campaign_bridge,"")))
    | eval IsWon_flag=if(like(lower(tostring(coalesce(IsWon,is_won,""))),"1") OR match(lower(StageName),"closed\\s?won"),1,0)
    | stats sum(eval(if(IsWon_flag=1,tonumber(coalesce(Amount,amount,"0")),0))) AS closed_won_value dc(Id) AS won_opportunities by bridge_key
    | rename bridge_key AS campaign_id
]
| fillnull value=0 won_opportunities
| eval cost_per_won_opp=if(isnotnull(won_opportunities) AND won_opportunities>0, round(spend_usd/won_opportunities,2), null())
| eval channel_roas=if(spend_usd>0 AND reported_revenue_usd>0, round(reported_revenue_usd/spend_usd,2), null())
| eval mer_ratio=if(spend_usd>0 AND reported_revenue_usd>0, round(reported_revenue_usd/spend_usd,4), null())
| eval segment=coalesce(customer_segment,company_segment,"general")
| lookup customer_ltv_by_segment.csv segment OUTPUT mo12_ltv_usd AS twelve_month_ltv
| eval ltv_adjusted_roas=if(spend_usd>0 AND isnotnull(twelve_month_ltv), round((reported_conversions*twelve_month_ltv)/spend_usd,2), null())
| lookup target_cpa_thresholds.csv platform OUTPUT target_cpa_threshold min_roas_floor
| fillnull value=999999 target_cpa_threshold
| fillnull value=1.5 min_roas_floor
| eval monthly_budget_usd=tonumber(coalesce(monthly_budget_usd,campaign_budget_usd,"250000"))
| eval spend_to_date_usd=spend_usd
| eval budget_used_pct=if(monthly_budget_usd>0, round(100*spend_to_date_usd/monthly_budget_usd,1), null())
| eval days_into_month=tonumber(strftime(now(),"%e"))
| eval pacing_health=case(days_into_month>0 AND budget_used_pct/nullif(days_into_month,0)*30 > 110,"Over-Pace", days_into_month>0 AND budget_used_pct/nullif(days_into_month,0)*30 < 90,"Under-Pace", 1=1,"On-Pace")
| bin _time span=7d
| sort campaign_id _time
| streamstats current=f window=1 last(channel_cpa_blended) AS previous_week_cpa by campaign_id
| eval cpa_delta_pct=if(isnotnull(previous_week_cpa) AND previous_week_cpa>0, round(100*(channel_cpa_blended-previous_week_cpa)/previous_week_cpa,1), null())
| eval spend_at_risk=if(channel_cpa_blended>target_cpa_threshold OR cpa_delta_pct>25 OR ltv_adjusted_roas<min_roas_floor OR (quality_score_band="Below-Avg" AND spend_usd>5000), spend_usd, 0)
| where channel_cpa_blended>target_cpa_threshold OR cpa_delta_pct>25 OR ltv_adjusted_roas<min_roas_floor OR (quality_score_band="Below-Avg" AND spend_usd>5000)
| sort - spend_at_risk
| table platform campaign_name campaign_id spend_usd impressions clicks reported_conversions channel_cpa_blended channel_cpa_qualified cost_per_won_opp channel_roas mer_ratio ltv_adjusted_roas quality_score_band avg_quality_score qc_avg_cpc avg_rank_lost avg_budget_lost pacing_health cpa_delta_pct bid_buckets spend_at_risk tz_anchor qc_band_peer_avg last_reporting_anchor
description: Monitors normalized paid-placement feeds plus CRM-attributed outcomes so performance marketers see blended acquisition cost, seller-grade relevance signals (Quality Score bands on auction search lanes, Quality Impact deltas on Microsoft Advertising, relevance stacks where walled gardens expose rankings instead of QS integers), ROAS/MER cousins, pacing stress, and impression-share loss split across rank-lost versus budget-lost versus eligibility-lost slices. Splunk stitches OAuth-polled channel facts with Salesforce closed-won bridges and optional first-touch UTM governance rows so Splunk-native thresholds highlight programmes spending heavily while auctions degrade—distinct from blended portfolio ROI studies (UC-23.3.1), funnel-stage leakage scans (UC-23.3.2), inbox-deliverability telemetry (UC-23.3.3), SEO/traffic sourcing from raw server logs (UC-23.3.4), content lift experiments (UC-23.3.6), and webinar attribution packs (UC-23.3.7). Cross-check narrative overlaps with UC-23.1.5 only where harmonized attribution windows feed CPA comparisons.
value: Chief marketing officers and performance-media directors negotiate reallocations faster when Splunk aligns invoice-ready USD spend with CRM-backed acquisition economics instead of trusting isolated auction consoles—protecting quarterly pipeline commitments before treasury closes books. FP&A pairs pacing_health tiles with CFO-ready MER versus Magic Number overlays when benchmarking SaaS portfolios against Bessemer Cloud Index quartiles (Magic Number north of ~0.85 for top cohorts). Demand-gen operators compare CPA deltas versus WordStream-class CTR baselines while guarding budgets against QS erosion that lifts CPC fifty percent despite unchanged bids.
implementation: Provision OAuth modular inputs plus Splunk credential objects per walled garden; normalize GAQL JSON (microcurrency fields ÷ 1,000,000), Insights JSON (`cost_per_action_type` arrays flattened upstream), LinkedIn UTC timestamps, TikTok bidding enums; maintain KV lookups `fx_rates_daily.csv`, `customer_ltv_by_segment.csv`, `utm_campaign_taxonomy.csv`, `target_cpa_thresholds.csv`; mirror Salesforce Opportunities via Splunk DB Connect or Splunk Add-on for Salesforce; terminate Google Tag Manager / GA4 tagging proofs through HEC for UTM audits; publish Dashboard Studio workbook `paid_media_qs_roas` fed by saved search above.
visualization: Dashboard Studio layout: splunk.timeline on spend_usd versus pacing_health annotations; splunk.scatter with X axis avg_quality_score or qc_avg_cpc, Y axis channel_cpa_blended, point size spend_usd, split by platform; splunk.boxplot summarizing CPA distribution across bid_strategy_bucket; splunk.singlevalue tiles for blended CPA week-over-week delta; splunk.table ranked by spend_at_risk including avg_rank_lost versus avg_budget_lost columns for diagnostics.

references.title: Meta Marketing API — Insights edge reference

knownFalsePositives:
- **Treasury FX Reset**: invoices close on quarter-end FX while Splunk applies daily curves, causing CPA ladders to spike without a real bid change. Suppress via the lookup `treasury_fx_close_register.csv` keyed on `currency_iso`+`fx_date`+`fx_source` (TTL <= 24 h) and a `where fx_treasury_aligned=true` filter; require warehouse watermark audit.
- **UTC-Boundary / Timezone Pull Misalignment**: LinkedIn UTC pulls and Google Ads account-local snapshots duplicate conversion rows. Suppress via the lookup `paid_media_utc_dedup_register.csv` keyed on `vendor`+`account_id`+`event_signature_hash` (TTL <= 5 minutes) and a `where utc_dedup_status="unique"` filter.
- **Smart-Bidding Strategy Swap**: migrating between Target CPA and Target ROAS resets learning phases producing 14-day instability. Suppress via the change-window register `paid_media_smart_bidding_register.csv` keyed on `campaign_id`+`bid_strategy_id`+CHG_id (TTL <= 14 days post-swap) and a `where NOT smart_bidding_change_active` filter.
- **Sophisticated-Invalid-Traffic (SIVT)**: bot impressions inflate without conversions, collapsing CTR to look like fatigue. Suppress via the lookup `paid_media_sivt_register.csv` keyed on `vendor`+`creative_id`+`sivt_signature_hash` and a `where moat_score>=70 AND doubleverify_score>=70` filter; require MOAT or DoubleVerify overlay before alerting.
- **Dynamic Creative Optimization (DCO)**: PMax mixes creatives within single auctions and CPA attribution is non-deterministic. Suppress via the lookup `paid_media_dco_register.csv` keyed on `creative_asset_id`+`auction_id` and a `where dco_attribution_resolved=true` filter.
detailedImplementation:
Implementation upgraded with explicit Splunkbase IDs, sourcetypes, KV Store collections, and SPL artefacts.

1. Prerequisites - Provision `index=marketing_paid_media` (volume `marketing`), `frozenTimePeriodInSecs = 31536000` (12 months hot+warm+cold) and `homePath.maxDataSizeMB = 24576` for paid-media metrics; create role `paid_media_role` in `authorize.conf` with `srchIndexesAllowed = marketing_paid_media;_audit;_internal`. Configure HEC tokens for Google Ads / Meta / LinkedIn / TikTok webhook receivers with HMAC validation.

2. Configure data collection - Deploy custom modular inputs / Splunk Add-on Builder ([Splunkbase 2962](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2962)) REST workers polling Google Ads API v17 (`customers/{customer_id}/googleAds:search`), Meta Marketing API (`/{ad_account_id}/insights`), LinkedIn Ads (`/v2/adAnalyticsV2`), TikTok OAuth (`/business/get/`) every 15 minutes. Forward to Heavy Forwarders sending to `index=marketing_paid_media` with `sourcetype=google_ads:campaign_metrics`, `sourcetype=meta:insights`, `sourcetype=linkedin:campaign_analytics`, `sourcetype=tiktok:report`. Configure `props.conf`: `KV_MODE = json`, `INDEXED_EXTRACTIONS = json`, `TIMESTAMP_FIELDS = segments.date,date_start,reportDate,stat_time_day`. Configure HEC for SIVT-overlay reports from MOAT (`/v2.4/inventory`) and DoubleVerify (`/v3/aod-analytics`) into `sourcetype=moat:sivt` and `sourcetype=doubleverify:audit`. Stand up KV Store collections via `collections.conf`: `paid_media_smart_bidding_register`, `paid_media_sivt_register`, `paid_media_dco_register`, `paid_media_utc_dedup_register`, `treasury_fx_close_register`. Configure Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) for Salesforce CRM revenue join via `db_connect_inputs.conf` JDBC poll into `sourcetype=salesforce:opportunity`.

3. Create search and alert - Build the saved search `paid_media_cpa_anomaly_v3` in `app/marketing_analytics/local/savedsearches.conf` with `cron_schedule = */15 * * * *`, `dispatch.earliest_time = -2h`, `dispatch.latest_time = now`, `action.notable = 1`, `alert.severity = 5`. Use SPL: `index=marketing_paid_media (sourcetype=google_ads:campaign_metrics OR sourcetype=meta:insights OR sourcetype=linkedin:campaign_analytics OR sourcetype=tiktok:report) | eval cpa_usd = if(cost_micros>0,cost_micros/1000000/conversions,null()) | join campaign_id [search index=marketing_paid_media sourcetype=salesforce:opportunity earliest=-30d | stats sum(amount_usd) as revenue_usd by campaign_id] | eventstats avg(cpa_usd) as cpa_baseline_30d, stdev(cpa_usd) as cpa_stdev_30d by campaign_id | eval cpa_anomaly_score = (cpa_usd - cpa_baseline_30d) / cpa_stdev_30d | where abs(cpa_anomaly_score) >= 2.5 AND smart_bidding_change_active=0 | lookup paid_media_sivt_register.csv vendor creative_id OUTPUT moat_score, doubleverify_score | where moat_score>=70 AND doubleverify_score>=70`. Wire alert action `script:soar_paid_media_remediation_v2.py` to invoke SOAR playbook.

4. Validate - Run the positive controlTest scenario (CPA anomaly inject) and confirm alert firing within 15-min window. Run the negative scenario (Smart-Bidding learning phase) and confirm suppression. Validate `notable_index` row count via `| search index=notable source_uc=UC-23.3.5 | stats count by severity`. Cross-reference Google Ads / Meta API rate-limit logs in `_internal` to ensure poller health; verify warehouse watermark via `index=marketing_paid_media | tstats latest(_time) where index=marketing_paid_media`.

5. Operationalize and Troubleshoot - Schedule the `data/marketing/paid_media_review.md` weekly review with Marketing Operations + RevOps + Treasury. Common issues: API v17 deprecation breaks Google Ads sync (refresh ad-blueprint via `data/marketing/google_ads_v17_migration.md`); MOAT SIVT lag delays suppression for >12 h (extend TTL via `lookup_definitions.conf` and propagate to `paid_media_sivt_register.csv`); Smart-Bidding strategy migrations cause `cpa_anomaly_score` flutter (validate against `paid_media_smart_bidding_register.csv` registration). Splunk Add-on Builder REST workers may fail with HTTP 401 — rotate OAuth tokens via the platform secrets vault and reload with `splunk reload deployment-server`. Quarterly Mixed-Media-Modelling vendor reconciliation cross-stamps Splunk MTA outputs into `index=audit`.
grandmaExplanation: We watch paid placements so pricey auctions cannot silently drain budgets before finance notices shrinking returns. We compare invoice-grade spend against measured conversions and auction-quality grades so teams rebalance bids before quarters slip.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Inject 30 days of synthetic Google Ads / Meta / LinkedIn / TikTok cost extracts for 24 paid-media campaigns / $2.4M monthly spend. Days 1-15 use baseline blended CPA=$78, blended ROAS=4.6:1, Google Ads quality-score p50=7.4. Days 16-30 force blended CPA to $192 (+146%) via Quality Score collapse on PMax (p50=4.2) while spend stays flat. Confirm the saved search `paid_media_cpa_anomaly_v3` fires with `severity=critical`, `notable_index=notable`, attaches `cpa_change_15d=+146%`, drives a SOAR playbook (`paid_media_remediation_v2`) that pauses underperforming Smart-Bidding strategies and creates a Salesforce CRM case for the Paid-Media team.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Pre-populate `paid_media_smart_bidding_register.csv` with `campaign_id=PMAX_BLACK_FRIDAY_2025`, `bid_strategy_id=tROAS_to_tCPA`, `change_start=now()-7d`, `change_end=now()+7d`, `change_ticket_id=CHG0021034`, `approver=paid_media_lead@example.com`, `expected_cpa_swing_pct=85`. Replay 14 days of synthetic events with blended CPA swinging +85% during the registered Smart-Bidding learning phase. Confirm `paid_media_cpa_anomaly_v3` does NOT fire (eval `smart_bidding_change_active=1` excludes the cohort from CPA aggregations). Confirm the audit dashboard `PaidMediaCPAExceptions` records the suppression with reason=`smart_bidding_learning_phase` and SHA-256 hash.

evidence: Dashboard Studio panel `PaidMediaCPAExec` archived weekly to `evidence_index` with `evidence_type=paid_media_cpa_health` and a SHA-256 hash. Saved-search run history exported via `| rest /services/saved/searches/paid_media_cpa_anomaly_v3` with `latest_runtime_iso`. Google Ads API v17 / Meta Marketing API / LinkedIn Ads / TikTok OAuth poll execution logs retained 13 months. MOAT / DoubleVerify SIVT-overlay reports cross-referenced with auction telemetry; SOAR `paid_media_remediation_v2` execution log archived.
exclusions: Influencer / creator-marketing performance excluded (covered by UC-23.3.6). Affiliate-network performance (CJ Affiliate, Impact, Awin) tracked in UC-23.3.7. Direct-mail / outdoor / TV CPA out of scope. Programmatic CTV / DV360 audience-extension auction reconciliation handled in UC-23.3.6.
